tagline: Building Skills. Creating Opportunities. Driving Impact.
heroText: Awadh Educational Welfare Society empowers learners, volunteers, and communities through education, employability, and socially driven action. We connect people to practical skills, inclusive opportunities, and mission-led partnerships that create measurable impact.
aboutIntro: AEWS is a government-registered NGO focused on education, skill development, community events, and placement-oriented support for emerging talent and underserved communities.
aboutFull: Awadh Educational Welfare Society works at the intersection of education, skills, and opportunity. We run practical learning initiatives, volunteer-led drives, employability support, and service partnerships that help individuals and organizations grow together. Our approach combines local trust, professional execution, and measurable outcomes so every class, every drive, and every partnership produces lasting value.
workAreas: Education support for learners and communities
Skill development programs with practical outcomes
Events and social drives with volunteer participation
servicesIntro: AEWS supports institutions, communities, and businesses through service delivery that is disciplined, people-first, and execution-ready.
partnershipIntro: We collaborate with communities, companies, and civic groups to design purposeful drives and campaigns with real participation on the ground.
donationIntro: Your contribution helps us expand access to learning, community support, and opportunity-building programs that directly benefit people who need them most.
donationUsage: Donations are used for training resources, event execution, volunteer coordination, beneficiary outreach, and community welfare activities.
